global_context.scene_description: A full-frame UI mockup that fills the entire image, designed to look exactly like a Booking.com or Airbnb travel-booking date-search results page, but for AC installation appointments instead of hotel rooms. NO phone, NO real-world environment, NO hand. Just the UI fills the frame edge-to-edge. At the very top: a clean header bar. The header has the text 'AC INSTALL - MESA' as the search title in bold black. In the top-right corner of the header area, sitting cleanly without crowding the title, a small compact circular guarantee badge (medallion style, approximately 90px diameter relative to the frame). The badge is a deep-red or dark-navy circle with thin gold border and reads 'BEAT ANY QUOTE GUARANTEED' in clean small bold uppercase white sans-serif text wrapping inside the circle (could be split across 3 short lines: 'BEAT ANY' / 'QUOTE' / 'GUARANTEED'). A small generic search bar sits below the title, with filter and sort icons on the right. Below the header, a list of available date options stacked vertically as cards, looking exactly like Booking.com hotel result cards. The list shows 5 dates from May through July: (1) FRI MAY 12 - 'Available' green tag, price shown as '$149/mo' in large bold black with a small grey 'financing' subtitle below, BOOK button blue (2) FRI MAY 26 - 'Available' yellow-green tag, $9,800 with $10,000 strikethrough, BOOK button blue (3) WED JUN 14 - 'Limited - 2 left' orange tag, $11,500 with $12,200 strikethrough, BOOK button blue (4) TUE JUL 4 - 'Only 1 left! High demand' bold red tag with fire icon, $14,500 in bold red large text with $16,000 strikethrough, '7 people are looking at this date right now' microcopy, BOOK button red (5) TUE JUL 18 - 'Sold out - waitlist' faded dark red, $15,500 strikethrough, 'JOIN WAITLIST' button. Each row has a small calendar icon on the left showing the month and day, a heart/save icon top-right of each row. Familiar booking-site visual language - small badges, urgency cues, tiny pricing strikethroughs, all the visual machinery of urgency-booking sites. Mood: oh god, the supply is running out and the price is climbing exactly like a hotel during a conference. Pure clean UI mockup edge-to-edge, NOT a phone, NOT a hand.

composition.framing: full-frame UI mockup, no real-world context, edge-to-edge
composition.focal_point: the JULY 4 row with red 'Only 1 left! High demand' urgency callout; the BEAT ANY QUOTE badge in top-right serves as a credibility anchor
